song.title: I Am the Lord's
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I am the Lord’s! O joy beyond expression, O sweet response To voice of love Divine;|| Faith’s joyous “Yes” To the assuring whisper, “Fear not! I have redeemed thee; Thou art Mine.”
[V2] 2) I am the Lord’s! It is the glad confession Wherewith the Bride Recalls the happy day,|| When love’s “I will” Accepted Him forever, “The Lord’s,” to love, To honor and obey.
[V3] 3) I am the Lord’s! Yet teach me all it meaneth, All it involves of love and loyalty,|| Of holy service, Absolute surrender, And unreserved obedience unto Thee.
[V4] 4) I am the Lord’s! Yes; body, soul, and spirit, O seal them irrecoverably Thine;|| As Thou, Beloved, In Thy grace and fulness Forever and forevermore art mine.
song.author: Lucy A. Bennett
